name: Felix 12x20 Garage Shed Plan - A Compact Garage + Porch Designed for Warm Curb Appeal, Practical Storage & Everyday DIY Function
open_features: A beautifully proportioned garage layout paired with a covered porch-ideal for seating, potting, tool staging, or simple backyard relaxation.
Straightforward framing, simple roof geometry, and clear plan details make the Felix accessible for both new builders and seasoned DIYers.
Smooth access for lawn equipment, ATVs, motorcycles, bikes, tools, woodworking materials, or garden supplies.
Rich horizontal wood siding, crisp white trim, lantern-style lighting, and a clean gable roofline give the Felix a cozy, cottage-inspired appearance with modern durability.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Felix Garage Shed Plan - a 12x20 multi-use garage and porch design crafted for efficiency, charm, and practical day-to-day use. Featuring a classic gable roof, warm wood siding, expanded floor space, and a small covered side porch, the Felix combines timeless style with flexible utility for homeowners who want both beauty and performance.
